releases.author: Jeel-Shah
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* NO-ISSUE: Updated README to include new info about installation by @Jeel-Shah in https://github.com/Jeel-Shah/todo-wrangler/pull/5
* ISSUE-4: Added optional whitespace between checkbox brackets by @toneffectory in https://github.com/Jeel-Shah/todo-wrangler/pull/6

## New Contributors
* @Jeel-Shah made their first contribution in https://github.com/Jeel-Shah/todo-wrangler/pull/5
* @toneffectory made their first contribution in https://github.com/Jeel-Shah/todo-wrangler/pull/6

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Jeel-Shah/todo-wrangler/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2
releases.name: More Checkbox Handling!

releases.author: Jeel-Shah
releases.description:
### TODO Wrangler v1.0.0 Release Notes

🎉 Initial Release:
We're excited to introduce the first release of TODO Wrangler for Obsidian. Wrangle those todos and keep your notes organized!

**New Features:**
- Custom Keywords: Unleash the power of customization! You're not limited to "TODO" anymore; set your own keyword for extraction and personalize your workflow.

**Bug Fixes:**

- Fixed a pesky bug where an existing todo section would get duplicated. Now, your notes remain as clean as ever!

Thank you for your support, and we look forward to bringing more features and improvements in the upcoming releases!
releases.name: First Release: 1.0.1
